remarks: Bright and spacious studio-style apartment featuring high ceilings, a large kitchen with plenty of cabinet space, a full bathroom, and laundry hookups. Enjoy abundant natural light through numerous windows and step out onto a huge private deck through sliding glass doors. The open layout offers a comfortable living space, and all utilities are included, making this apartment a perfect place to call home.
